description: This file defines a stub implementation of an email provider used within a notification system. It provides a method to simulate sending emails by logging the email details without actually sending any emails. The class is intended for development or CI environments where real email delivery is not required.

classes.name: StubEmailProvider
classes.description: A stub implementation of the EmailProvider interface that logs email details instead of sending actual emails. Used mainly in development or CI environments.

methods.name: StubEmailProvider
methods.description: Constructor initializing the provider with notification properties.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Simulates sending an email by logging the email information, including sender, recipient, subject, event type, draft ID, applicant user ID, and body text.
